title: hieracium balbisianum subsp. balbisianum
intro: Hieracium balbisianum subsp. balbisianum, also known as a species of hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Hieracium balbisianum subsp. balbisianum include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. This plant has various health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium balbisianum subsp. balbisianum is used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
